docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-26-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, EDMUND

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHENG, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, EDMUND $905.46 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $945.46, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1207.26, AND DETERMINES 25% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF - THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, EDMUND
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENG, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, EDMUND
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT LEE, EDMUND ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,207.26 FILED BY CHENG, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, EDMUND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
